reviews.comment: Frederick Window Tinting is the only place to have your windows tinted. Knowledgeable, talented, super friendly and professional. I wouldn’t trust anyone else with my vehicles. They are the best.

reviews.comment: This is the second car I’ve had tinted by this shop and they have been very accommodating and the attention to detail is amazing. I had a few people tell me first hand that tinting the rear  glass on Chargers never comes out nice but Joe did a great job and so far it looks like it came from the factory. This is a family owned business and Joe and wife, “Sharyn” work great together so be sure to check them out!

reviews.comment:
I could not have asked for anything better. I'm SO happy with my tints.

If you're looking for a tint job, look no further. Seriously, don't. No point in settling for a cheap tint. Give your car the quality work it deserves. HUGE thanks to Frederick Window Tinting!!! They're the best of the best in Frederick. No doubt. Professional, kind, quick and efficient. I will absolutely use them again in the future and recommend them to everyone I know!

reviews.comment: This was my first experience getting a vehicle's windows tinted. The staff at Frederick Window Tinting was extremely knowledgeable and answered all of my questions. I am extremely happy with their work, and am recommending them to all of my family and friends. I'll be taking all of my vehicles to them from now on!

reviews.comment: I recently had my truck tinted at FWT and I could not be more pleased with the entire experience.  Joe and Sharyn were very engaging from start to finish answering all my questions thoroughly.  When I picked my truck up the tint looked great and was just what I wanted.  The quality of work was amazing and not only does my black F-150 have that nice look, but it is noticeably cooler on the inside with the heat rejecting Phantom S9 tint I had installed.  If you want a quality product and service, then look no further than FWT!  I’ll be back.
reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4OE1XUUJREAE

reviews.comment: Very great experience with this team here...got my father's and my truck done same day... Fast, courteous, professional and personable...will definitely be going back for more work and absolutely recommend to anyone wanting a fantastic window tinting service...!!!
